message:
fix(cx,http): reduce lock contention in checkpoint and auto-send H2 WINDOW_UPDATE

- cx.rs: Refactor checkpoint() and checkpoint_with() to extract all
  needed values from the RwLock in a single write-lock acquisition,
  then pass them to a new check_cancel_from_values() method. This
  eliminates the previous pattern of holding a write lock (for
  recording) then immediately acquiring a read lock (for cancel check),
  reducing lock contention in hot checkpoint paths. The existing
  check_cancel() method is preserved for callers that don't record.

- h2/connection.rs: Replace TODO with actual WINDOW_UPDATE auto-send
  logic. When recv_window drops below half the default connection
  window size (low watermark), automatically send a WINDOW_UPDATE
  frame to replenish the window. Prevents flow control stalls when
  receiving large data payloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
